english_text: Heart, Intellect — Conflict — I should submit
alt_text: Pedagogical scene of the 'reproachful soul': a Quran at top with arrows down to Heart (قلب) and Intellect (عقل), a red Conflict marker between them; a purple human head says 'I should submit'. A purple arrow labelled 'Conflict' points downward.
notes: Diagrammatic portrait of nafs al-Lawwama — recognizes the need to submit, in conflict.
